src/test/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Activate the 'test' Spring profile to ensure test-specific configuration is loaded during test execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven project property to target Java 17 instead of Java 11.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 2.6.2 to support Java 17 and newer features.
Increment the project artifact version to 1.1.0.
Add Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency for routing capabilities.
Add spring-dotenv dependency to load environment variables from .env files.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code.
Add Springfox Boot Starter for Swagger API documentation.
Add Springfox Swagger UI dependency for the web interface of API docs.
Remove Flyway core dependency, likely replacing it with another migration strategy or removing it.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin to generate code coverage reports.
Add a production Maven profile to configure production-specific settings.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to the production profile to build the React frontend.
Add maven-antrun-plugin to the production profile to copy frontend build artifacts.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add patterns to ignore temporary files created by Emacs editor.
Add patterns to ignore temporary directories and reports generated by Stryker mutation testing tool.
Add pattern to ignore the static output directory of Storybook builds.
Add pattern to ignore package-lock.json at the root level while explicitly keeping the one in the frontend directory.
Add pattern to ignore local environment configuration files containing sensitive data.

dev_environment.general_idea: Expose port 6006 in the Docker container to support Storybook development environment.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Add Maven resource filtering placeholder for active Spring profiles.
Disable the Open Session in View pattern to improve performance and avoid lazy loading issues.
Configure Google OAuth2 client ID with fallback to environment variables and default value.
Configure Google OAuth2 client secret with fallback to environment variables and default value.
Set the requested scopes for Google OAuth2 login.
Expose the mappings endpoint in Spring Boot Actuator for debugging.
Set the base path for Swagger v2 documentation.
Set Hibernate DDL auto mode to update schema on startup.
Configure admin emails property with fallback to environment variables and default value.
Explicitly set the path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to maintain compatibility with older Spring MVC behavior or specific routing requirements.
